report_text:
--- CAPABILITIES (CAPA) ---

  - compress data via WinAPI
  - get common file path
  - get file size
  - link function at runtime on Windows
  - download and write a file

CAPA RULE MATCHES (MBC):

  - contain loop
  - Data::Compress Data [C0024]
  - Discovery::File and Directory Discovery [E1083]
  - Communication::HTTP Communication::Send Request [C0002.003]
  - Communication::HTTP Communication::Create Request [C0002.012]
  - File System::Delete File [C0047]
  - Process::Terminate Process [C0018]
  - File System::Read File [C0051]
  - link function at runtime on Windows
  - Communication::HTTP Communication::Connect to Server [C0002.009]
  - Communication::HTTP Communication::Get Response [C0002.017]
  - Command and Control::C2 Communication::Receive Data [B0030.002]
  - File System::Writes File [C0052]

  - Execution::Install Additional Program [B0023]

  - read and send data from client to server
  - receive and write data from server to client
  - contain a resource (.rsrc) section

--- FILE IDENTITY ---

COMPILER AND PACKER:

  [Compiler] Microsoft Visual C/C++

  [Tool] Visual Studio
